# dexidp_client (Data Source)

Get a Dex oauth2 client by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_id` (String) The ID of the Dex oauth2 client.

### Read-Only

- `logo_url` (String) The URL to the logo of the Dex oauth2 client.
- `name` (String) The name of the Dex oauth2 client.
- `redirect_uris` (List of String) The allowed redirect_uris for this Dex Oauth2 client.
- `trusted_peers` (List of String) The trusted peers for this Dex Oauth2 client.
